## What and why

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` and `uv run ruff format .` pass
- [ ] Conventional Commit messages; no em or en dashes
- [ ] Any scientific claim cites a primary source (ledger row in `docs/verification-ledger.md`, named
      constant in code) and names its noise floor where relevant
- [ ] No mock or placeholder data presented as real
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or interfaces changed
